subject: [PATCH v2 19/28] nfsd: apply the notify mask to the delegation when requested

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch modifies the NFS server to apply a notify mask to directory delegations when requested by the client. If the client requests notifications, the appropriate return mask is set in gddr_notification[0]. The patch also ensures that if the client doesn't request NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND, no notifications are offered because the NFS server won't provide necessary information for classic notifications.
